8fbfe47983051d4aeed9c08ccfa27f173667e26a.summary: On Monday 13 April 2026 the Capital Market Authority (CMA, formerly the Securities and Commodities Authority / SCA) announced issuance of a new Virtual Assets Framework consisting of five core modules (General Requirements, Conduct of Business, Alternative Trading System, Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing, and Prudential Requirements) and expanding regulated activities from three to eight: Dealing in Virtual Assets as Principal, Dealing in Virtual Assets as Agent, Providing Custody, Arranging Custody, Arranging Investment Deals, Providing Investment Advice, Portfolio Management, and Operating a Multilateral Trading Facility. CAUTION FOR DRAFTING: the primary press release live-fetched at this link does not state a decision number, a grace-period end date, or which prior SCA decision (if any) is abrogated -- those specifics (e.g. 'Decision No. (4/R.M) of 2026', a 27 Feb 2027 grace period, abrogation of SCA Chairman Decision No. (26/RM) of 2023) were NOT confirmed from this primary source and must not be stated in a card without separately locating and citing the actual decision/legal text (not yet found live -- the CMA's regulations-listing pages are client-rendered and did not yield it, and uaelegislation.gov.ae is Cloudflare-blocked per config/jurisdictions/uae.json). Also note the originally proposed issuance date of 13 February 2026 does NOT match this primary source, which is dated 13 April 2026 -- use 13 April 2026.

d698ff8d003b3121287ac188d969912e044e2f88.summary: On 7 February 2023 VARA issued the Virtual Assets and Related Activities Regulations 2023 (V.1), together with compulsory and activity-specific rulebooks, activating Dubai's dedicated virtual-asset licensing regime under Law No. (4) of 2022. Live-confirmed: the founding law's Article 3 states the regime applies 'to the Virtual Asset services provided in all zones across the Emirate, including Special Development Zones and free zones but excluding the Dubai International Financial Centre.' The Regulations have since been revised (V.2 5 Jun 2023, V.3 19 Sep 2023, V.4 1 Oct 2024); the version currently live on rulebooks.vara.ae is effective from 19 June 2025, so this backfilled item marks the 7 Feb 2023 original issuance, not the current consolidated text.
